prompt: Carson County Needs You! As you know, Hurricane Melinda hits our region causing lot of damages of different nature. We hope that the hurricane has spared you, but your/our neighbors need your help! Let's volunteer today helping someone in need and let's do it all together, we have to set Carson County back on foot with our strenghts. Specifically, volunteer jobs include: * Prepare Disaster Kits for victims (kits include blankets, canned and dried food, water, first aid kit, toilet paper); * Gathering and distributing food and basic supplies for the shelters.; * Construction Work (no previous experience is needed); * Blood Donation (there are plenty of people hospitalized!); * Debris removal (especially in order to help emergency vehicles to pass through streets more easily); * Counseling; * Financial Assistance, especially if you don't have time to volunteer you can consider to donate money to our disaster relief fund; * Advocacy (in other words, help spread the word about this natural disaster so that we could raise more help); * Guidance through financial and career advice so that victims can get their lives back on track. Thanks in advance for your help!%%
